Maximilian Wackenhuth
ResearchTeachingConferences

Exercise classes and course coordination for

  • Algebraic Number Theory with Stefan Kühnlein in the summer term of 2021
  • Lie Algebras with Tobias Hartnick in the winter term of 2021/2022
  • Introduction to Algebra and Number Theory with Stefan Kühnlein in the summer term of 2022
  • Algebra with Stefan Kühnlein in the winter term of 2022/2023
  • Linear Algebra for Computer Science 1 & 2 with Rafael Dahmen in the winter term of 2023/2024 and the summer term of 2024
  • Linear Algebra for Computer Science 1 & 2 with Stefan Kühnlein in the winter term of 2024/2025 and the summer term of 2025

Seminars

  • Oberseminar Groups, Geometry and Dynamics in the summer term of 2023
  • Trigonometry in hyperbolic and spherical geometry for student teachers in the summer term of 2023
  • RTG Log Cabin Seminar on Boundaries, 4. – 7. September 2023
  • RTG Seminar on Morse Theory, 11. – 13. March 2024

Tutorials for

  • Analysis 2 in the summer term of 2020 (during my master’s degree)
  • Elementary Geometry in the summer term of 2023
